I'm guessing that you were pretty happy with what your fortune revealed. The way that a psychic works is by picking up on your small details. They observe your body language and ask you a few seemingly innocent questions. Your fortune is nothing more than a psychic telling you what you want to hear based on the small details they've spotted. Next time you visit one, try and pay attention to how you're reacting to their questions. Of course, the next step is to label aloud the emotion or the dynamic that you've detected and want to highlight. You can either phrase the label as a question or a statement. The only difference is whether you end the sentence with an upward inflection or a downward inflection. No matter how you end the sentence, you usually want to begin with roughly the same words. As mentioned before, it seems like, it sounds like, it looks like, it feels like. Remember the vast majority of the time, you don't want to use the word I. The final rule to labels is silence. Just like a mirror, after you throw out a label, you want to shut up and listen. It is really easy to feel the need to expand on what you said and provide a rationale for your label or say, have I got that right? Don't do either one. By throwing out the label and waiting, you're inviting your counterparts to reveal themselves. I want you to try this technique out in the real world. I want you to begin a conversation with someone. It doesn't matter who. Throw out a label on one of their emotions and then go silent. Let the label do its thing.
